compat.note: Verified openclaw range. The floor is enforced via package.json install.minHostVersion (openclaw refuses older hosts); a newer host only triggers a boot-time warning. Source of truth: @digital-me/runtime-openclaw compat.ts.

name: Digital Me Recall
description: Auto-applies wiki knowledge: boot-time protocol injection, per-turn memory_search recall with graph expansion, per-tool routed reminders, and memory_search observability. Declares a phantom 'recall_status' tool so the openclaw 2026.5.12 loader's discovery filter accepts this hooks-only plugin (the loader silently drops plugins with empty contracts.tools — see wiki: openclaw-loader-rejects-hook-only-plugins).

wikiRoot.description: Path to the digital-me wiki dir. Defaults to ~/digital-me/wiki/.

indexPath.description: Path to the wiki _INDEX.md file. Defaults to ~/digital-me/_INDEX.md.

protocolsDir.description: Optional dir of shared-protocol .md files injected at session start. Defaults to ~/.openclaw/shared_protocols/.

recallMaxResults.description: Max wiki entries injected per turn by Hook B (default: 5). Set 0 to disable per-turn recall.

recallGraphDepth.description: How many levels of related: edges to follow from each memory_search hit (default: 1).

enableRouteHashmap.description: Enable Hook C (per-tool route hashmap lookup). Default: true.

enableObservability.description: Enable Hook D (log memory_search calls to brain.db traces). Default: true.

brainDbPath.description: Path to brain.db for Hook D observability writes. Defaults to ~/.openclaw/data/brain.db.

appRateFlushIntervalMs.description: Periodic flush interval for the M1 application_rate writer (ms). Defaults to 300000 (5 min). Set 0 to disable periodic flush and rely solely on session_end / shutdown / exit triggers.

appRateStaleSessionMs.description: After this many ms of inactivity a session is considered stale: the periodic flush finalises it and drops the in-memory state. Defaults to 86400000 (24h).
